positive: Minimalist celestial fox silhouette, stylized and symmetrical, rendered in deep indigo and luminous gold foil effect. The fox sits gracefully amidst a stylized lunar crescent and falling abstract star trails. Clean lines, strong contrast, centered composition, suitable for modern apparel print. Highly detailed, vector art style, high contrast, flat graphic design elements, ethereal, glowing edges, cosmic, clean background.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grain, photorealism, gradients, deep shadows, jpeg artifacts
